name: DragonScales 5: The Frozen Tomb
short_description: A new DragonScales journey with expanded tile-matching challenges, battles, and extra missions. Zarya's adventure comprises 200 levels, new (and weird) characters, a few tricky puzzles, and unlockable power-ups. Her ultimate goal: releasing the dragon sealed in The Frozen Tomb!
detailed_description:
Zarya resumes her journey to the Frozen Tomb. New tile-matching puzzles and battles await! Unlock power-ups, battle your way through several beasts, and grow to become a master DragonScales magician!

Special features

  • 200 levels.
  • 12 missions to win items and coins.
  • Unlock missions by collecting up to 65 stars.
  • Battles are back, including 5 types of arrows.
  • Achievements and stats.
  • 20 extra battles in the Colosseum.
  • 16 unlockable magical cards.
  • Improve Zarya's battle status with stronger equipment.

supported_languages: English, French, German, Spanish - Spain, Dutch, Italian, Portuguese - Brazil
